import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../App'; import './HomePage.css'; const WORKSHOP_TYPES = [ { id: 1, name: 'Python', duration: 2, emoji: '🐍', desc: 'Scripting, data analysis and automation with Python' }, { id: 2, name: 'Scilab', duration: 3, emoji: '📐', desc: 'Numerical computing and simulation for engineering' }, { id: 3, name: 'OpenFOAM', duration: 5, emoji: '💨', desc: 'Computational fluid dynamics and FEA simulations' }, { id: 4, name: 'DWSIM', duration: 2, emoji: '⚗️', desc: 'Chemical process simulation and thermodynamics' }, { id: 5, name: 'eSim', duration: 3, emoji: '⚡', desc: 'Electronics design and SPICE circuit simulation' }, { id: 6, name: 'R', duration: 2, emoji: '📊', desc: 'Statistical computing and data visualisation' }, ]; const STATS = [ { value: '2500+', label: 'Workshops Conducted' }, { value: '180+', label: 'Colleges Reached' }, { value: '60,000+', label: 'Students Trained' }, { value: '15+', label: 'Workshop Types' }, ]; export default function HomePage() { const { user } = useAuth(); const heroRef = useRef(null); useEffect(() => { const el = heroRef.current; if (!el) return; const onMove = (e) => { const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5) * 30; const y = ((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5) * 20; el.style.setProperty('--gx', `${50 + x * 0.4}%`); el.style.setProperty('--gy', `${50 + y * 0.4}%`); }; el.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove); return () => el.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove); }, []); return (
{/* Hero */}
